title: Sean Rutgerson
description: Professional RL coach & former South Africa international rugby league footballer
extract: Sean Rutgerson (born 9 February 1978) is the head coach of the United States and a former professional rugby league footballer. His primary position was as prop, but he also played in the second-row. Over his career, Rutgerson played for the North Sydney Bears and the Canberra Raiders in the Australian National Rugby League, the Salford City Reds in the Super League and the Jacksonville Axemen in the AMNRL.
